mapper.select: SELECT aa.*, st.name AS student_name FROM abnormal_attendance aa LEFT JOIN student st ON aa.student_id = st.id ORDER BY aa.id
SELECT aa.*, st.name AS student_name FROM abnormal_attendance aa LEFT JOIN student st ON aa.student_id = st.id WHERE aa.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO abnormal_attendance (attendance_id, student_id, abnormal_type, description, handle_status, handle_result, handler_id, handle_time) VALUES (#{attendanceId}, #{studentId}, #{abnormalType}, #{description}, #{handleStatus}, #{handleResult}, #{handlerId}, #{handleTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE abnormal_attendance SET attendance_id=#{attendanceId}, student_id=#{studentId}, abnormal_type=#{abnormalType}, description=#{description}, handle_status=#{handleStatus}, handle_result=#{handleResult}, handler_id=#{handlerId}, handle_time=#{handleTime} WHERE id = #{id}
